Class PlayGameCLI

java.lang.Object
whistapp.ui.CLI
whistapp.ui.GameCLI
whistapp.ui.PlayGameCLI
public class PlayGameCLI extends GameCLI
CLI for playing a virtual game of Whist.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class CLI

    controller, scanner

    Constructor
    Description
    PlayGameCLI(Controller controller)
    Create a PlayGameCLI bound to the given controller.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    showAllRounds()
    Drive the round loop: repeatedly play a round until the user indicates they do not want to play another round.
    protected void
    showIntro()
    Clear the screen and show a short introduction describing this CLI mode.
    protected void
    showLastDealtCard()
    Shows the last dealt card, which is always dealt face up and determines the trump for some bids.
    protected void

    Display the intermediate scores of every player.

    Prompt the user for player information and start a new game with the controller.

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayGameCLI

      public PlayGameCLI(Controller controller)
      Create a PlayGameCLI bound to the given controller.
      Parameters:
      controller - the application controller used to manage the game

  • Method Details

    • showIntro

      protected void showIntro()
      Clear the screen and show a short introduction describing this CLI mode.
      Specified by:
      showIntro in class GameCLI

    • startNewGame

      protected void startNewGame()
      Prompt the user for player information and start a new game with the controller.

      The user is first asked how many real players will participate. If the number is smaller than the total player count, bot difficulty is requested and bots will fill the remaining player slots.

      The method will loop until valid player names are provided. On success the registered names are printed to standard output.

      Specified by:
      startNewGame in class GameCLI

    • showAllRounds

      protected void showAllRounds()
      Drive the round loop: repeatedly play a round until the user indicates they do not want to play another round.
      Specified by:
      showAllRounds in class GameCLI

    • showRoundPoints

      protected void showRoundPoints()
      Display the intermediate scores of every player.

      This method is intended to show some intermediate score after a round, not the results of an entire game.

      Shows the points earned and lost per player this round

      Overrides:
      showRoundPoints in class GameCLI

    • showLastDealtCard

      protected void showLastDealtCard()
      Shows the last dealt card, which is always dealt face up and determines the trump for some bids.
